gdpr_quote: The instructions for use shall contain at least the following information: (a) the identity and the contact details of the provider and, where applicable, of its authorised representative; (b) the characteristics, capabilities and limitations of performance of the high-risk AI system, including: (i) its intended purpose;
policy_quote: Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 1) intended uses, Provide documentation to customers which describes the system's: 2) evidence that the system is fit for purpose for each intended use. When the system is a platform service made available to external customers or partners, include this information in the required Transparency Note.
mismatch: The regulation requires an 'instructions for use' artifact, whereas the policy commits to 'documentation to customers' and a 'Transparency Note' for platforms.
analysis: The method/artefact for delivering user-facing information differs in terminology and format; this is an execution style difference and does not inherently negate compliance with content requirements.
